mapper.select: SELECT pest_id, temperature_range, humidity_range, environment_description, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM new_table_for_environment_conditions WHERE pest_id = #{pestId} AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT pest_id, temperature_range, humidity_range, environment_description, delete_flag, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM new_table_for_environment_conditions WHERE pest_id = #{pestId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO new_table_for_environment_conditions ( pest_id, temperature_range, humidity_range, environment_description, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{pestId}, #{temperatureRange}, #{humidityRange}, #{environmentDescription}, #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.update: UPDATE new_table_for_environment_conditions SET temperature_range = #{temperatureRange}, humidity_range = #{humidityRange}, environment_description = #{environmentDescription}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE pest_id = #{pestId}
UPDATE new_table_for_environment_conditions SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE pest_id = #{pestId} AND delete_flag = 0
